description: Phase 27: Complete the Universal Notification Center with DND enforcement, smart batching, deduplication, snooze, and cross-device single-delivery. Enhance the existing UniversalNotificationCenter class in packages/notifications/src/universal-notification-center.ts and add supporting modules for the fanout service with full delivery pipeline.
steps: 1. Enhance packages/notifications/src/types.ts: Add new types for DND config with active-hours detection, notification urgency levels per category (message/mention/security/billing/social/system/marketing), snooze options (15min/1hr/tomorrow/next-active), notification preview privacy (hidden/subject/full), per-thread mute config, inline reply payload, cross-app deep link schema, and 'important only' mode filter.

2. Rewrite packages/notifications/src/universal-notification-center.ts with these capabilities: (a) DND enforcement - store per-user DND schedule, reject all non-critical notifications during DND, queue them for delivery when DND ends. (b) Smart batching - group similar notifications within a 5-minute window into a single summary notification using a BatchAccumulator class. (c) Cross-device deduplication - track delivered notification IDs per user so the same notification appears only once across all devices. (d) Smart timing - store user active hours (derived from last activity timestamps), defer low-priority notifications to active windows. (e) Per-thread mute - allow muting at any granularity (app/thread/sender). (f) Notification preview privacy levels (hidden/subject/full) applied at delivery time. (g) Snooze support - snooze(notificationId, duration) moves notification to a snooze queue, re-delivers after duration. (h) 'Remind me about this' - alias for snooze with custom duration. (i) Inline reply from notification - accept reply payload and route to source app via event. (j) 'Important only' mode - filter to only critical/high priority. (k) Cross-app deep links with app/screen/params structure.

3. Create packages/notifications/src/services/dnd-service.ts: Dedicated DND service that checks if current time falls within user's DND schedule (supporting timezone), queues suppressed notifications, and flushes them when DND ends. Should integrate with PreferenceService for DND config.

4. Create packages/notifications/src/services/batch-service.ts: Smart batching service that accumulates similar notifications (same type + same sender/thread within 5-min window), collapses them into a single summary notification, and emits the batch when the window closes or a threshold count is reached.

5. Create packages/notifications/src/services/dedup-service.ts: Cross-device deduplication service. Tracks notification delivery per user+device. When a notification is marked delivered on one device, it is suppressed on others (still stored for read-later but not pushed again).

6. Create packages/notifications/src/services/snooze-service.ts: Manages snoozed notifications with configurable durations (15min, 1hr, tomorrow 9am, next-active-window). Re-queues notification for delivery when snooze expires.

7. Create packages/notifications/src/services/web-push-service.ts: VAPID-based Web Push service using the web-push npm package. Supports subscription management, payload encryption, and delivery with TTL.
8. Update packages/notifications/src/index.ts: Export all new services and types (DndService, BatchService, DedupService, SnoozeService, WebPushService, and updated types).

9. Create packages/notifications/src/__tests__/dnd-service.test.ts: Test DND enforcement - 100 notifications during DND results in 0 delivered; notifications flush when DND ends; critical notifications bypass DND.

10. Create packages/notifications/src/__tests__/batch-service.test.ts: Test smart batching - 5 similar notifications within 5 min collapse to 1; different types are not batched; batch flushes on window close.
11. Create packages/notifications/src/__tests__/dedup-service.test.ts: Test deduplication - same notification to same user only delivers once across devices.
12. Create packages/notifications/src/__tests__/snooze-service.test.ts: Test snooze - notification disappears after snooze, reappears after duration.
13. Create packages/notifications/src/__tests__/web-push-service.test.ts: Test VAPID web push - subscription registration, send with valid payload, error handling.
15. Verify: Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/notifications and pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/notifications to confirm all gates pass.
acceptance_criteria: DND enforcement: When DND is active, 0 notifications are delivered (except critical); all are queued and delivered when DND ends
Smart batching: 5 similar notifications within 5 minutes collapse into 1 batched notification
Cross-device dedup: A notification delivered to device A is not re-pushed to device B for the same user
Snooze: Snoozed notification re-appears after the specified duration
Web Push: VAPID subscription management and send work correctly (unit tested with mocks)
All existing tests in packages/notifications/src/__tests__/ continue to pass
findings: All 94 tests pass (8 test files). Typecheck passes. noUnusedParameters is strict in tsconfig - required _ prefix for intentionally unused params. Commit linting enforces lowercase subject after type prefix. Prettier runs via lint-staged pre-commit hook.
